summary: Tested BreedCakeManager admin tab, Gallery/Generation sub-tabs, illustration cards, inline edit panel with Cloudinary, Generation tab with per-breed progress bars, DoggyBakeryCakeModal handleOrder ticket flow, and breed-cake-banner on /celebrate. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) backend 500 due to null initial_message access; (2) frontend missing parent_id in attach_or_create_ticket call. All 9 backend tests pass. Full order flow confirmed end-to-end with ticket TDB-2026-0672 created.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: request.initial_message.sender accessed without null check → AttributeError 500 when initial_message is None
handleOrder sends POST to attach_or_create_ticket WITHOUT required parent_id → 422 Validation Error. Also missing initial_message field with baker's brief.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added 'user' to useAuth() destructure; added parent_id: user?.id || user?.email || '' and initial_message: {sender, source, text} to request payload. Removed subject/body fields (not in request model).

action_items: INFO: Console error '[GLOBAL SOCKET] Connection error: timeout' appears on /celebrate — unrelated to this feature, likely a WebSocket heartbeat issue
INFO: Duplicate React key warning 'go' in Admin nav — minor, won't affect functionality
INFO: Generation still running at ~78% (126/161) — will complete without intervention
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: mira_service_desk.py line 669 — unconditional access to request.initial_message.sender when initial_message can be None → AttributeError 500

FIXED: DoggyBakeryCakeModal.handleOrder — missing parent_id (required Pydantic field) caused 422 on every order attempt. Also subject/body fields were sent but silently ignored by Pydantic (not in AttachOrCreateTicketRequest model). Now sends parent_id + initial_message correctly.
INFO: Admin nav has duplicate 'go' key warning — likely a small duplicate in tab list, low priority
INFO: BreedCakeManager DELETE endpoint uses /api/breed-products/{id} — verify this route exists in backend (not tested here)
seed_data_creation: Created test ticket TDB-2026-0672 in service_desk_tickets collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: BreedCakeManager admin tab fully working at /admin COMMERCE section. Gallery shows 118+ breed cake illustrations (161 total, generation ongoing). Each card has regenerate/download/delete. Inline edit has CloudinaryUploader + prompt preview. Generation tab shows per-breed progress bars. DoggyBakeryCakeModal order flow: attach_or_create_ticket endpoint fixed (parent_id required, initial_message null check). Order creates ticket with full baker's brief. breed-cake-banner on /celebrate opens modal correctly. Auth: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (access_token field in login response).

bug_1_backend_500.root_cause: mira_service_desk.py attach_or_create_ticket function appended to conversation dict using request.initial_message.sender at line 669 without first checking if initial_message is None. The Pydantic model has initial_message as Optional with None default.
bug_1_backend_500.reproduction: POST /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket with parent_id but without initial_message
bug_1_backend_500.mitigation: Added 'if request.initial_message:' guard before the conversation.append block

bug_2_frontend_422.root_cause: DoggyBakeryCakeModal.handleOrder destructured only 'token' from useAuth() — not 'user'. The parent_id (required Pydantic field) was never included in the request payload. Additionally, subject/body fields sent were not in AttachOrCreateTicketRequest model.
bug_2_frontend_422.reproduction: Open modal, select illustration, click order button → 422 Validation Error: 'parent_id' required
bug_2_frontend_422.mitigation: Added user to useAuth() destructure; added parent_id: user?.id || user?.email to payload; added initial_message with baker's brief text
